action_mappings.revoke_primary_approver: revoke primary approver candidate {} from incident case {}

action_mappings.detach_distribution_list_from_case: detach distribution list {} from incident case {}

action_mappings.author_finalize_draft_with_template: finalize communication draft for incident case {} using communication template {}

action_mappings.unbind_service_from_case: unbind affected service {} from incident case {}

action_mappings.unbind_stakeholder_from_case: unbind stakeholder representative {} from incident case {}

action_mappings.unbind_component_from_case: unbind infrastructure component {} from incident case {}
action_mappings.bind_technical_reviewer_to_case: bind technical reviewer {} to incident case {}
action_mappings.unbind_technical_reviewer_from_case: unbind technical reviewer {} from incident case {}
action_mappings.plan_communication_action_with_service_a: plan communication action {} with affected service {} and stakeholder representative {} for incident case {}
action_mappings.plan_communication_action_with_component: plan communication action {} with infrastructure component {} and compliance artifact {} for incident case {}
action_mappings.reserve_execution_slot: reserve execution slot for incident case {} involving affected service {} and stakeholder representative {}

action_mappings.record_channel_approvals_with_operations: record channel approvals with operations for incident case {} involving infrastructure component {}, technical reviewer {}, and operations approver {}
action_mappings.promote_to_ready_for_release: promote incident case {} to ready for release involving affected service {} and stakeholder representative {}
action_mappings.author_finalize_draft_after_ready: author and finalize draft for incident case {} after ready status with distribution list {} by communications author {}
action_mappings.confirm_distribution_after_ready: confirm distribution for incident case {} after ready status with distribution list {}
action_mappings.confirm_oncall_distribution_after_ready: confirm on-call distribution for incident case {} after ready status with oncall reviewer {}
action_mappings.apply_template_to_case: apply communication template {} to incident case {}
action_mappings.apply_template_across_internal_and_custo: apply communication template {} across internal facing incident {} and customer facing incident {}
action_mappings.mark_communications_sent: mark communications as sent for incident case {} with distribution list {} by communications author {}
action_mappings.set_final_approval_flag_standard: set the final approval flag for incident case {}
action_mappings.set_final_approval_flag_with_template: set the final approval flag for incident case {} using communication template {}
action_mappings.set_final_approval_flag_after_send: set the final approval flag for incident case {} after communications have been sent

action_mappings_indef.declare_incident_case: declare incident case an incident case {}
action_mappings_indef.assign_primary_approver: assign a primary approver candidate {} as primary approver to an incident case {}
action_mappings_indef.revoke_primary_approver: revoke a primary approver candidate {} from an incident case {}
action_mappings_indef.attach_distribution_list_to_case: attach a distribution list {} to an incident case {}
action_mappings_indef.detach_distribution_list_from_case: detach a distribution list {} from an incident case {}
action_mappings_indef.record_review_for_distribution_list: record review for a distribution list {} in an incident case {}
action_mappings_indef.collect_oncall_reviewer_ack: collect acknowledgment from an oncall reviewer {} for an incident case {}
action_mappings_indef.author_finalize_draft_with_author: finalize communication draft for an incident case {} with a communications author {} and a distribution list {}
action_mappings_indef.author_finalize_draft_with_template: finalize communication draft for an incident case {} using a communication template {}
action_mappings_indef.bind_service_to_case: bind an affected service {} to an incident case {}
action_mappings_indef.unbind_service_from_case: unbind an affected service {} from an incident case {}
action_mappings_indef.bind_stakeholder_to_case: bind a stakeholder representative {} to an incident case {}
action_mappings_indef.unbind_stakeholder_from_case: unbind a stakeholder representative {} from an incident case {}
action_mappings_indef.bind_component_to_case: bind an infrastructure component {} to an incident case {}
action_mappings_indef.unbind_component_from_case: unbind an infrastructure component {} from an incident case {}
action_mappings_indef.bind_technical_reviewer_to_case: bind a technical reviewer {} to an incident case {}
action_mappings_indef.unbind_technical_reviewer_from_case: unbind a technical reviewer {} from an incident case {}
action_mappings_indef.plan_communication_action_with_service_a: plan a communication action {} with an affected service {} and a stakeholder representative {} for an incident case {}
action_mappings_indef.plan_communication_action_with_component: plan a communication action {} with an infrastructure component {} and a compliance artifact {} for an incident case {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_execution_slot: reserve execution slot for an incident case {} involving an affected service {} and a stakeholder representative {}
action_mappings_indef.record_channel_approvals: record channel approvals for an incident case {} involving an affected service {}, a stakeholder representative {}, and an executive approver {}
action_mappings_indef.record_channel_approvals_with_operations: record channel approvals with operations for an incident case {} involving an infrastructure component {}, a technical reviewer {}, and an operations approver {}

action_mappings_indef.author_finalize_draft_after_ready: author and finalize draft for an incident case {} after ready status with a distribution list {} by a communications author {}
action_mappings_indef.confirm_distribution_after_ready: confirm distribution for an incident case {} after ready status with a distribution list {}
action_mappings_indef.confirm_oncall_distribution_after_ready: confirm on-call distribution for an incident case {} after ready status with an oncall reviewer {}

action_mappings_indef.apply_template_across_internal_and_custo: apply a communication template {} across an internal facing incident {} and a customer facing incident {}

predicate_mappings.primary_approver_assigned: the primary approver {} is assigned to the case {}
predicate_mappings.communication_draft_available: a communication draft is available for {}
predicate_mappings.channel_approval_confirmed: the channel approval for {} is confirmed
predicate_mappings.final_approval_flag: the final approval flag for {} is set
predicate_mappings.escalation_flag: the escalation flag for {} is set
predicate_mappings.internal_incident_template_link: the internal incident template link for {} is {}
predicate_mappings.template_applied_to_internal_case: the template {} is applied to the internal case {}
predicate_mappings.communications_sent_flag: communications have been sent for the incident case {}
predicate_mappings.action_slot_available: the action slot for {} is available
predicate_mappings.eligible_primary_approver_for_case: {} is an eligible primary approver for the case {}
predicate_mappings.eligible_communication_action_for_case: {} is an eligible communication action for the case {}
predicate_mappings.eligible_service_for_case: {} is an eligible service for the case {}
predicate_mappings.eligible_stakeholder_for_case: {} is an eligible stakeholder for the case {}
predicate_mappings.eligible_component_for_case: {} is an eligible component for the case {}
predicate_mappings.eligible_compliance_artifact_for_case: {} is an eligible compliance artifact for the case {}
predicate_mappings.eligible_technical_reviewer_for_case: {} is an eligible technical reviewer for the case {}
predicate_mappings.template_applied_to_customer_case: {} is applied to the customer case {}
predicate_mappings.compliance_attachment_required: a compliance attachment is required for the case {}
predicate_mappings.customer_incident_template_link: the customer incident template link for the case {} is {}

declare_incident_case.description: declare incident case an incident case A
preconditions: I can only declare incident case an incident case A if it is not the case that the case A is registered and it is not the case that the final approval flag for A is set
effects: Once I declare incident case an incident case A, it is the case that the case A is registered

assign_primary_approver.description: assign a primary approver candidate B as primary approver to an incident case A
preconditions: I can only assign a primary approver candidate B as primary approver to an incident case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and the approver candidate B is available and B is an eligible primary approver for the case A
I can only assign a primary approver candidate B as primary approver to an incident case A if it is not the case that A has a primary approver
effects: Once I assign a primary approver candidate B as primary approver to an incident case A, it is the case that the primary approver B is assigned to the case A and A has a primary approver
Once I assign a primary approver candidate B as primary approver to an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that the approver candidate B is available

revoke_primary_approver.description: revoke a primary approver candidate B from an incident case A
preconditions: I can only revoke a primary approver candidate B from an incident case A if it is the case that the primary approver B is assigned to the case A
I can only revoke a primary approver candidate B from an incident case A if it is not the case that the execution of A is validated and it is not the case that the channel approval for A is confirmed
effects: Once I revoke a primary approver candidate B from an incident case A, it is the case that the approver candidate B is available

Once I revoke a primary approver candidate B from an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that the primary approver B is assigned to the case A and it is not the case anymore that A has a primary approver and it is not the case anymore that A has received a review and it is not the case anymore that a communication draft is available for A and it is not the case anymore that the escalation flag for A is set and it is not the case anymore that A is ready for release and it is not the case anymore that a compliance attachment is required for the case A

attach_distribution_list_to_case.description: attach a distribution list B to an incident case A
preconditions: I can only attach a distribution list B to an incident case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and the distribution list B is available
effects: Once I attach a distribution list B to an incident case A, it is the case that B is assigned to the case A
Once I attach a distribution list B to an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that the distribution list B is available

detach_distribution_list_from_case.description: detach a distribution list B from an incident case A
preconditions: I can only detach a distribution list B from an incident case A if it is the case that B is assigned to the case A
effects: Once I detach a distribution list B from an incident case A, it is the case that the distribution list B is available
Once I detach a distribution list B from an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to the case A

record_review_for_distribution_list.description: record review for a distribution list B in an incident case A
preconditions: I can only record review for a distribution list B in an incident case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and A has a primary approver and B is assigned to the case A
I can only record review for a distribution list B in an incident case A if it is not the case that A has received a review
effects: Once I record review for a distribution list B in an incident case A, it is the case that A has received a review

collect_oncall_reviewer_ack.description: collect acknowledgment from an oncall reviewer B for an incident case A
preconditions: I can only collect acknowledgment from an oncall reviewer B for an incident case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and A has a primary approver and the on call reviewer B is available
I can only collect acknowledgment from an oncall reviewer B for an incident case A if it is not the case that A has received a review
effects: Once I collect acknowledgment from an oncall reviewer B for an incident case A, it is the case that A has received a review and the escalation flag for A is set
Once I collect acknowledgment from an oncall reviewer B for an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that the on call reviewer B is available

author_finalize_draft_with_author.description: finalize communication draft for an incident case A with a communications author C and a distribution list B
preconditions: I can only finalize communication draft for an incident case A with a communications author C and a distribution list B if it is the case that A has received a review and A has a primary approver and B is assigned to the case A and the communications author C is available
I can only finalize communication draft for an incident case A with a communications author C and a distribution list B if it is not the case that a communication draft is available for A
effects: Once I finalize communication draft for an incident case A with a communications author C and a distribution list B, it is the case that a communication draft is available for A
Once I finalize communication draft for an incident case A with a communications author C and a distribution list B, it is not the case anymore that the escalation flag for A is set

author_finalize_draft_with_template.description: finalize communication draft for an incident case A using a communication template B
preconditions: I can only finalize communication draft for an incident case A using a communication template B if it is the case that A has a primary approver and the template B is applied to the internal case A
I can only finalize communication draft for an incident case A using a communication template B if it is not the case that a communication draft is available for A
effects: Once I finalize communication draft for an incident case A using a communication template B, it is the case that a communication draft is available for A
Once I finalize communication draft for an incident case A using a communication template B, it is not the case anymore that the escalation flag for A is set

bind_service_to_case.description: bind an affected service B to an incident case A
preconditions: I can only bind an affected service B to an incident case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and the service B is available and B is an eligible service for the case A
effects: Once I bind an affected service B to an incident case A, it is the case that A has the service B
Once I bind an affected service B to an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that the service B is available

unbind_service_from_case.description: unbind an affected service B from an incident case A
preconditions: I can only unbind an affected service B from an incident case A if it is the case that A has the service B
effects: Once I unbind an affected service B from an incident case A, it is the case that the service B is available
Once I unbind an affected service B from an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that A has the service B

bind_stakeholder_to_case.description: bind a stakeholder representative B to an incident case A
preconditions: I can only bind a stakeholder representative B to an incident case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and the stakeholder representative B is available and B is an eligible stakeholder for the case A
effects: Once I bind a stakeholder representative B to an incident case A, it is the case that A has the stakeholder B
Once I bind a stakeholder representative B to an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that the stakeholder representative B is available

unbind_stakeholder_from_case.description: unbind a stakeholder representative B from an incident case A
preconditions: I can only unbind a stakeholder representative B from an incident case A if it is the case that A has the stakeholder B
effects: Once I unbind a stakeholder representative B from an incident case A, it is the case that the stakeholder representative B is available
Once I unbind a stakeholder representative B from an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that A has the stakeholder B

bind_component_to_case.description: bind an infrastructure component B to an incident case A
preconditions: I can only bind an infrastructure component B to an incident case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and the infrastructure component B is available and B is an eligible component for the case A
effects: Once I bind an infrastructure component B to an incident case A, it is the case that A has the component B
Once I bind an infrastructure component B to an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that the infrastructure component B is available

unbind_component_from_case.description: unbind an infrastructure component B from an incident case A
preconditions: I can only unbind an infrastructure component B from an incident case A if it is the case that A has the component B
effects: Once I unbind an infrastructure component B from an incident case A, it is the case that the infrastructure component B is available
Once I unbind an infrastructure component B from an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that A has the component B

bind_technical_reviewer_to_case.description: bind a technical reviewer B to an incident case A
preconditions: I can only bind a technical reviewer B to an incident case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and the technical reviewer B is available and B is an eligible technical reviewer for the case A
effects: Once I bind a technical reviewer B to an incident case A, it is the case that A binds the technical reviewer B
Once I bind a technical reviewer B to an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that the technical reviewer B is available

unbind_technical_reviewer_from_case.description: unbind a technical reviewer B from an incident case A
preconditions: I can only unbind a technical reviewer B from an incident case A if it is the case that A binds the technical reviewer B
effects: Once I unbind a technical reviewer B from an incident case A, it is the case that the technical reviewer B is available
Once I unbind a technical reviewer B from an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that A binds the technical reviewer B

plan_communication_action_with_service_a.description: plan a communication action B with an affected service C and a stakeholder representative D for an incident case A
preconditions: I can only plan a communication action B with an affected service C and a stakeholder representative D for an incident case A if it is the case that A has a primary approver and A has the service C and A has the stakeholder D and the action slot for B is available and B is an eligible communication action for the case A
I can only plan a communication action B with an affected service C and a stakeholder representative D for an incident case A if it is not the case that the execution of A is validated
effects: Once I plan a communication action B with an affected service C and a stakeholder representative D for an incident case A, it is the case that A plans the action B and the execution of A is validated
Once I plan a communication action B with an affected service C and a stakeholder representative D for an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that the action slot for B is available

plan_communication_action_with_component.description: plan a communication action B with an infrastructure component C and a compliance artifact D for an incident case A
preconditions: I can only plan a communication action B with an infrastructure component C and a compliance artifact D for an incident case A if it is the case that A has a primary approver and A has the component C and the compliance artifact D is available and the action slot for B is available and B is an eligible communication action for the case A and D is an eligible compliance artifact for the case A
I can only plan a communication action B with an infrastructure component C and a compliance artifact D for an incident case A if it is not the case that the execution of A is validated
effects: Once I plan a communication action B with an infrastructure component C and a compliance artifact D for an incident case A, it is the case that A plans the action B and the execution of A is validated and a compliance attachment is required for the case A and the escalation flag for A is set

Once I plan a communication action B with an infrastructure component C and a compliance artifact D for an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that the action slot for B is available and it is not the case anymore that the compliance artifact D is available

reserve_execution_slot.description: reserve execution slot for an incident case A involving an affected service B and a stakeholder representative C
preconditions: I can only reserve execution slot for an incident case A involving an affected service B and a stakeholder representative C if it is the case that the execution of A is validated and a compliance attachment is required for the case A and A has the service B and A has the stakeholder C
effects: Once I reserve execution slot for an incident case A involving an affected service B and a stakeholder representative C, it is not the case anymore that a compliance attachment is required for the case A and it is not the case anymore that the escalation flag for A is set

record_channel_approvals.description: record channel approvals for an incident case A involving an affected service B, a stakeholder representative C, and an executive approver D
preconditions: I can only record channel approvals for an incident case A involving an affected service B, a stakeholder representative C, and an executive approver D if it is the case that a communication draft is available for A and the execution of A is validated and A has the service B and A has the stakeholder C and A requires approval from the channel D

I can only record channel approvals for an incident case A involving an affected service B, a stakeholder representative C, and an executive approver D if it is not the case that the escalation flag for A is set and it is not the case that the channel approval for A is confirmed
effects: Once I record channel approvals for an incident case A involving an affected service B, a stakeholder representative C, and an executive approver D, it is the case that the channel approval for A is confirmed

record_channel_approvals_with_operations.description: record channel approvals with operations for an incident case A involving an infrastructure component B, a technical reviewer C, and an operations approver D
preconditions: I can only record channel approvals with operations for an incident case A involving an infrastructure component B, a technical reviewer C, and an operations approver D if it is the case that a communication draft is available for A and the execution of A is validated and A has the component B and A binds the technical reviewer C and A requires approval from the channel D

I can only record channel approvals with operations for an incident case A involving an infrastructure component B, a technical reviewer C, and an operations approver D if it is not the case that the channel approval for A is confirmed
effects: Once I record channel approvals with operations for an incident case A involving an infrastructure component B, a technical reviewer C, and an operations approver D, it is the case that the channel approval for A is confirmed and the escalation flag for A is set

promote_to_ready_for_release.description: promote an incident case A to ready for release involving an affected service B and a stakeholder representative C
preconditions: I can only promote an incident case A to ready for release involving an affected service B and a stakeholder representative C if it is the case that the channel approval for A is confirmed and the escalation flag for A is set and A has the service B and A has the stakeholder C
effects: Once I promote an incident case A to ready for release involving an affected service B and a stakeholder representative C, it is the case that A is ready for release

Once I promote an incident case A to ready for release involving an affected service B and a stakeholder representative C, it is not the case anymore that the escalation flag for A is set and it is not the case anymore that a communication draft is available for A and it is not the case anymore that a compliance attachment is required for the case A

author_finalize_draft_after_ready.description: author and finalize draft for an incident case A after ready status with a distribution list B by a communications author C
preconditions: I can only author and finalize draft for an incident case A after ready status with a distribution list B by a communications author C if it is the case that A is ready for release and the channel approval for A is confirmed and A has a primary approver and B is assigned to the case A and the communications author C is available

I can only author and finalize draft for an incident case A after ready status with a distribution list B by a communications author C if it is not the case that a communication draft is available for A
effects: Once I author and finalize draft for an incident case A after ready status with a distribution list B by a communications author C, it is the case that a communication draft is available for A

confirm_distribution_after_ready.description: confirm distribution for an incident case A after ready status with a distribution list B
preconditions: I can only confirm distribution for an incident case A after ready status with a distribution list B if it is the case that the channel approval for A is confirmed and a communication draft is available for A and B is assigned to the case A

I can only confirm distribution for an incident case A after ready status with a distribution list B if it is not the case that the escalation flag for A is set and it is not the case that the distribution for A is confirmed
effects: Once I confirm distribution for an incident case A after ready status with a distribution list B, it is the case that the distribution for A is confirmed

confirm_oncall_distribution_after_ready.description: confirm on call distribution for an incident case A after ready status with an oncall reviewer B
preconditions: I can only confirm on call distribution for an incident case A after ready status with an oncall reviewer B if it is the case that the channel approval for A is confirmed and a communication draft is available for A and the on call reviewer B is available

I can only confirm on call distribution for an incident case A after ready status with an oncall reviewer B if it is not the case that the escalation flag for A is set and it is not the case that the distribution for A is confirmed
effects: Once I confirm on call distribution for an incident case A after ready status with an oncall reviewer B, it is the case that the distribution for A is confirmed
Once I confirm on call distribution for an incident case A after ready status with an oncall reviewer B, it is not the case anymore that the on call reviewer B is available

apply_template_to_case.description: apply a communication template B to an incident case A
preconditions: I can only apply a communication template B to an incident case A if it is the case that the distribution for A is confirmed and the communication template B is available and the customer incident template link for the case A is B
effects: Once I apply a communication template B to an incident case A, it is the case that B is applied to the customer case A
Once I apply a communication template B to an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that the communication template B is available

apply_template_across_internal_and_custo.description: apply a communication template C across an internal facing incident A and a customer facing incident B
preconditions: I can only apply a communication template C across an internal facing incident A and a customer facing incident B if it is the case that the case A is registered and A is an internal case and the internal incident template link for A is C and C is applied to the customer case B
I can only apply a communication template C across an internal facing incident A and a customer facing incident B if it is not the case that the template C is applied to the internal case A
effects: Once I apply a communication template C across an internal facing incident A and a customer facing incident B, it is the case that the template C is applied to the internal case A

mark_communications_sent.description: mark communications as sent for an incident case A with a distribution list B by a communications author C
preconditions: I can only mark communications as sent for an incident case A with a distribution list B by a communications author C if it is the case that the case A is registered and A is an internal case and a communication draft is available for A and the distribution for A is confirmed and B is assigned to the case A and the communications author C is available
I can only mark communications as sent for an incident case A with a distribution list B by a communications author C if it is not the case that communications have been sent for the incident case A
effects: Once I mark communications as sent for an incident case A with a distribution list B by a communications author C, it is the case that communications have been sent for the incident case A

set_final_approval_flag_standard.description: set the final approval flag for an incident case A
preconditions: I can only set the final approval flag for an incident case A if it is the case that A is a customer facing case and the case A is registered and A has a primary approver and the execution of A is validated and the channel approval for A is confirmed and the distribution for A is confirmed and a communication draft is available for A
I can only set the final approval flag for an incident case A if it is not the case that the final approval flag for A is set
effects: Once I set the final approval flag for an incident case A, it is the case that the final approval flag for A is set

set_final_approval_flag_with_template.description: set the final approval flag for an incident case A using a communication template B
preconditions: I can only set the final approval flag for an incident case A using a communication template B if it is the case that A is an internal case and the case A is registered and A has a primary approver and the execution of A is validated and the channel approval for A is confirmed and the distribution for A is confirmed and a communication draft is available for A and the template B is applied to the internal case A
I can only set the final approval flag for an incident case A using a communication template B if it is not the case that the final approval flag for A is set
effects: Once I set the final approval flag for an incident case A using a communication template B, it is the case that the final approval flag for A is set

set_final_approval_flag_after_send.description: set the final approval flag for an incident case A after communications have been sent
preconditions: I can only set the final approval flag for an incident case A after communications have been sent if it is the case that A is an internal case and the case A is registered and A has a primary approver and the execution of A is validated and the channel approval for A is confirmed and the distribution for A is confirmed and a communication draft is available for A and communications have been sent for the incident case A
I can only set the final approval flag for an incident case A after communications have been sent if it is not the case that the final approval flag for A is set
effects: Once I set the final approval flag for an incident case A after communications have been sent, it is the case that the final approval flag for A is set

action_nl_templates.assign_primary_approver: assign primary approver candidate {?primary_approver_candidate} as primary approver to incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates.revoke_primary_approver: revoke primary approver candidate {?primary_approver_candidate} from incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates.attach_distribution_list_to_case: attach distribution list {?distribution_list} to incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates.detach_distribution_list_from_case: detach distribution list {?distribution_list} from incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates.record_review_for_distribution_list: record review for distribution list {?distribution_list} in incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates.collect_oncall_reviewer_ack: collect acknowledgment from oncall reviewer {?oncall_reviewer} for incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates.author_finalize_draft_with_author: finalize communication draft for incident case {?incident_case} with communications author {?communications_author} and distribution list {?distribution_list}
action_nl_templates.author_finalize_draft_with_template: finalize communication draft for incident case {?incident_case} using communication template {?communication_template}

predicate_nl_templates.action_slot_available: the action slot for {?communication_action} is available

action_nl_templates_indef.unbind_component_from_case: unbind an infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component} from an incident case {?incident_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.unbind_technical_reviewer_from_case: unbind a technical reviewer {?technical_reviewer} from an incident case {?incident_case}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a incident case or a primary approver candidate or a communication action or a stakeholder representative or a affected service or a infrastructure component or a distribution list or a oncall reviewer or a communication template or a communications author or a compliance artifact or a technical reviewer or a approval channel is also a object
Everything that is a executive approver or a operations approver is also a approval channel
Everything that is a customer facing incident or a internal facing incident is also a incident case
